content.query:
GuardicorePolicyRules_CL
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
| where action contains "block"
| extend RulesetName = case(
    isempty(ruleset_name) or ruleset_name == "", "default",
    ruleset_name
)
| summarize TotalHitCount = sum(hit_count) by RulesetName
| top 10 by TotalHitCount desc
| project RulesetName, BlockingHits = TotalHitCount
content.title: Top Blocking Rulesets

content.query:
let startDate = startofday(ago(7d));
let endDate = startofday(now());
let all_days = range day from startDate to endDate step 1d;
// Get the latest record per application id per day
let dailyLatest = GuardicoreApplications_CL
| where TimeGenerated >= startDate
| extend day = startofday(TimeGenerated)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id, day;
let daily_counts = dailyLatest
| extend Status = case(
    tolower(state) contains "block", "Block",
    tolower(state) contains "alert", "Alert",
    "Other"
)
| where Status in ("Block", "Alert")
| summarize
    Block = dcountif(project_name, Status == "Block"),
    Alert = dcountif(project_name, Status == "Alert")
    by day;
all_days
| join kind=leftouter (daily_counts) on day
| extend Block = coalesce(Block, 0),
         Alert = coalesce(Alert, 0)
| project day = format_datetime(day, "yyyy-MM-dd"), Block, Alert
| sort by day asc
content.title: Applications in Block vs. Alert Status
content.noDataMessage: No applications with block/alert status found

content.query:
GuardicorePolicyRules_CL
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
| summarize count = count() by action
| extend actionFormatted = replace("_", " ", tolower(action))
| extend actionFormatted = strcat(toupper(substring(actionFormatted, 0, 1)), substring(actionFormatted, 1))
| project Action = actionFormatted, Count = count
| order by Count desc
content.title: Policy Rules by Action Type

content.json: This dashboard provides insights into workload protection status across your environment, including total workloads, protected workloads, and coverage trends over the last 7 days.

content.title: 📈 Protection Coverage Trend (7 Days)
content.noDataMessage: No policy rules found in the specified time range

content.title: 🔢 Total vs Protected Workloads (Last 24h)
